name: Agent Auth API
objective: Build Agent Auth API paid product — a dedicated auth layer for AI agents with token-based identity, scope enforcement, rate limiting, and audit logging (Hobby $0/Pro $29/Scale $99 tiers)
exit_criteria: Accounts can register agents up to tier quota
Agents get amu_xxx.yyy tokens shown once at creation
Token verification returns agent identity + scopes
Scale tier: custom scope registration works
Unit tests pass for all new endpoints
LSP diagnostics clean on all changed files
